Review_Text: The battery drains from 100 to 0 in under 4 hours. Completely unusable for a full workday.
Phone gets dangerously hot near the camera module when playing simple games.
The macro lens is a gimmick and the main lens struggles to auto-focus in low light.
After just two weeks I can already see a ghost image of the status bar burned into the OLED.
Swiping between home screens stutters constantly. The UI is poorly optimized.
Fastest phone I have ever used. Everything loads instantly.
Daylight photos are crisp and vibrant. Highly recommend for photography.
The 120Hz refresh rate makes scrolling incredibly smooth.
Good specs but the device feels like a brick in my pocket. Uncomfortable to hold.
For the price you get a lot of features. Missing wireless charging though.
I have to charge it twice a day. The standby drain is horrendous.
Watching a 10 minute YouTube video makes the back panel uncomfortably warm.
Portrait mode edge detection is awful. It blurs my hair and ears every time.
Noticed two dead pixels on the bottom right corner out of the box.
Instagram and WhatsApp crash randomly. The RAM management kills background apps too aggressively.
Looks very premium. The matte finish rejects fingerprints well.
The stereo speakers are incredibly loud and clear without distortion.
You absolutely need a case. It slid right off my desk.
Solid mid-range phone. Does everything I need it to do.
Phone shuts down randomly when it hits 15 percent battery. Faulty hardware.
Frame rates drop significantly after 5 minutes of gaming due to excessive heat.
Takes almost a full second to capture an image after pressing the button. Missed many shots.
At low brightness the entire display has a noticeable and ugly green tint.
Comes pre-installed with 20 garbage apps that you cannot uninstall. Infuriating.
No ads no bloatware. The interface is clean and snappy.
Goes from 0 to 100 in just 30 minutes. Very convenient.
Fits nicely in one hand unlike the giant max versions.
Annoyed that I have to buy dongles now. Otherwise fine.
Good signal strength and call quality. No dropped calls.
Phone only charges when the cable is held at a specific angle. Port is loose.
Keeps throwing a high temperature warning and turning off the flashlight.
4K video recording is incredibly shaky. OIS does not seem to work at all.
The under-display reader works maybe 1 out of 10 times. Total garbage.
Unlocks instantly. Best biometric scanner I have used.
Watching HDR content on Netflix looks breathtaking.
Dropped it on concrete and it barely got a scratch. Very durable.
The glossy back gets dirty immediately. Needs constant wiping.
Menu transitions are very Apple-esque. Extremely smooth.
Even with power saving mode on the battery drains fast. Software bug.
Just making a regular voice call makes the earpiece area uncomfortably hot.
Indoor lighting makes pictures look pale and lack contrast.
Scrolling text on a black background leaves terrible purple smearing trails.
Randomly disconnects from my home 5Ghz wifi network several times a day.
Gets 5G signal in areas where my old phone had zero bars.
Bluetooth codec support is great. My wireless earbuds sound amazing.
Best phone of the year. Unbeatable price to performance ratio.
The camera module sticks out too far. The phone wobbles flat on a table.
Received two major OS updates already. They support it well.
Battery max capacity dropped to 85 percent after just 3 months.
Charging the device makes the metal frame so hot it literally burns to touch.
The front facing camera over-smooths my face like a cheap beauty filter.
At 30 percent brightness the screen flickers visibly. Gives me a headache.
Audio constantly cuts in and out when connected to my car stereo.
Pairs instantly with my watch and car. Zero dropouts.
Can easily read text in direct summer sunlight. Display gets very bright.
The vibration motor feels premium. Typing is very satisfying.
I miss calls because the vibration is too weak to feel in my pocket.
Customization options are deep and useful. Love the theme engine.
Loses 20 percent battery overnight while doing absolutely nothing.
Because it runs so hot the battery efficiency is ruined.
Taking pictures near streetlights results in terrible lens flares and artifacts.
Viewing the screen from a slight angle causes the colors to wash out completely.
My cheek constantly mutes calls because the proximity sensor does not turn off the screen.
Everything functions exactly as advertised. No complaints at all.
12GB of RAM means apps never reload. Seamless switching.
The packaging was great and it came with a fast charger in the box.
Docking points because they did not include a charging brick.
Minimalist and professional. Does not look like a toy.
After 6 months the battery swelled up and popped the back glass off.
Turning on mobile hotspot shuts the phone down within 15 minutes due to heat.
Night mode takes 5 seconds to process and the result is a noisy mess.
The screen randomly registers taps when I am not touching it. Frustrating.
Google Maps constantly loses my location. Hardware defect.
Navigation is flawless even in dense city streets with tall buildings.
Once you use this display you cannot go back to 60hz.
Some older apps do not scale correctly and leave black bars on the sides.
The pro mode controls are very intuitive for manual photography.
Despite the claims it takes over 2 hours to fully charge.
The Snapdragon chip in this model is notoriously bad at heat management.
Camera tends to completely blow out the highlights in bright outdoor scenes.
The auto brightness constantly adjusts for no reason in a dark room.
There is a noticeable delay when typing quickly on the stock keyboard.
Handles Genshin Impact on highest settings without dropping a frame.
Pairs wonderfully with the brand's wireless earbuds and smartwatch.
Fell out of my pocket while biking and survived with just a dent.
The black paint around the charging port started chipping after a week.
Voice recording for videos is exceptionally clear.
Recent software update ruined the battery. Please fix this.
Left it in the sun for 2 minutes and it got too hot to safely hold.
Missed opportunity not including an ultrawide lens on a modern device.
The protective glass is soft. Keys in my pocket scratched it on day one.
The volume rocker got permanently stuck pressing down after minor use.
Physical buttons have great tactile feedback.
Dropped it in the sink and it survived without any issues.
Simply the best piece of tech I purchased this year.
Meets all expectations. Good job.
